messages.content: Mija!! Estamos ready for Saturday?? 🎃💀 What are you bringing to the party?
still deciding. maybe the pumpkin empanadas?
Oooh si!! Those were incredible last time. Im making mole negro 😍
nice. whos coming
You, me, Patricia, Marcos, the Nguyens, maybe Lucia if shes back from New York
ok cool. should i bring wine too
Yes please!! A good tinto 🍷
done ill order something from total wine
Perfecto! Also I was thinkin we go to the National Gallery on Friday? Theres a new exhibition 🎨
oh yeah i saw that. what time
11? Then lunch after?
works for me. friday gallery saturday dinner
Love it!! Going to be such a good weekend 🎉💀🎉
Sol guess what i just got us
2 tickets to the dc food and wine festival nov 15
YESSS!! 🎉 Omg the Georgetown one?? I went two years ago and the empanada booth was INCREDIBLE
yes! georgetown waterfront. noon to 6
This is going to be so fun!! We can scope out ideas for the thanksgiving video too 😏🍽️
exactly what i was thinking
ok i need to start planning the thanksgiving special. biggest video ive ever done
Pasteles de mama??? Tell me its pasteles 🙏
pasteles AND arroz con gandules AND turkey
Youre going to need a bigger kitchen 😂
lol shut up my kitchen is fine
Im so excited for this!! Your channel is going to blow up 🚀
lets not get ahead of ourselves
Oye when do u want to plan the menu? Friday dinner?
friday the 14th? yeah lets do dinner at my place and plan everything
Perfect! Ill bring wine 🍷
just got wizards celtics tix for next saturday
Ohhh can I come?? 🏀
already got u one sol
YESSS!! What time??
7pm. section 402
Sol my kitchen sink is leaking... this house I swear
oh no!! how bad?? ð©
like dripping onto the floor under the cabinet. noticed when my feet got wet lol
Mija thats not good! you need a plumber before it gets worse. do NOT ignore that
i know i know. do u still have that plumber u used last year
yes! Mike from Capitol Plumbing. let me find his info hold on
thank u
Mike Reeves, Capitol Plumbing. (202) 555-0461. service@capitolplumbingdc.com. Tell him I sent you he gave me a good price ð
ur the best. gonna email them first thing tmrw
is it still leaking?? do you need to turn the water off?
i put a bucket under it. its slow for now
ok good. keep me posted! these old rowhouses i swear ð
Sol I can't afford this but I can't tell her no
renata wants to study abroad. 8500 on top of tuition
Ay mija 😔 how much is in the 529?
8500. which is literally all of it. that was supposed to be for senior year
Dios mio. Can Tomas help?
ha
Im serious! He should be paying half of this at least
i know. ill ask but you already know the answer
Ask him. The worst he says is no and at least you tried 🙏
the worst he says is exactly what he always says. 'not in the agreement'
Que descaro. Ok pero at least try
ill text him this weekend. not tonight
Ok. Pero Adriana you cant keep absorbing everything by yourself. Your emergency fund...
i know Sol. i know
Te quiero mucho. Get some sleep ok? 💛
love u too. night
plumber came and fixed it. bad valve under the sink
oh good!! was it Mike?
yeah he was great. quick too, in and out in like 90 min
and the damage? ð¸
$450. coulda been worse
honestly not bad for DC plumbing. glad its done mija!
just texted tomas about splitting the study abroad
AND?? 🙏
'Not in the agreement.'
four words
NO MAMES 🤬
His daughter wants to study in SPAIN and he cant even contribute??
its fine Sol. im blocking off this afternoon to work through the numbers
Its not fine pero ok. You need help with anything you call me
thanks ❤️
leaving now. parking gonna be insane
On the metro! See u at the entrance 🏀
ugh
That 4th quarter was ROUGH 😩
celtics just toyed with them
At least we had fun! Those nachos tho 🤤
Oye can you make your tres leches for the December party? 🙏🎄
the holiday party? when is it
Dec 13! Saturday evening. Same crew plus a few new people I want you to meet
yeah i can do tres leches. might add cinnamon this time
YES do the cinnamon version omg 🤤🤤
ok ill plan for it. whats else on the menu
Im doing pernil and arroz con gandules! Patricia is bringing a salad lol 🥗
lol a salad. ok tres leches it is
Also!! I got us tickets to the Kennedy Center for the 12th. Holiday show 🎶🎄
oh fun. night before the dinner. good weekend
MIJA 4000 VIEWS!!!! 🎉🎉🎉🎉
I just checked your youtube and Pasteles de Mama has FOUR THOUSAND views
wait WHAT
i checked this morning and it was at like 1200
ITS BLOWING UP!! I told you!! 🚀🚀
oh my god Sol
You deserve this. That video was BEAUTIFUL. I cried watching you make teh pasteles
stop youre gonna make ME cry
The comments are so sweet too. People saying it reminds them of their abuelas 😭❤️
i know i keep reading them. this one woman said she hasnt had pasteles since her mom passed and shes going to try my recipe
PARA. Im going to cry at brunch rn 😭
lol sorry
Sol do NOT share this with anyone from the firm
I know I know 🤐
i mean it. if grayson or fatima find out about the channel im done
Mija I would never! Ok I sent it to like 3 friends but they dont know anyone at your firm
SOL
THEY DONT KNOW ANYONE!! Relax 😂
im serious
Ok ok Im sorry. No more sharing. Pero you should be PROUD of this ❤️
i am. quietly proud. at home. where nobody from work can see
Lol ok fair. But 4000 views mija!! 🥳
Sol i got an email from a kitchen brand
they want to do a holiday collab
WHAT!! Who??
CocinaTu Kitchen. they make cookware. said they love my content
Omg mija thats amazing!! What do they want you to do?
holiday recipe video using their products. theyd send me a cookware set and pay me 500
You should ABSOLUTELY do it!!
Sol you know i cant
Why not?? This is a legit brand deal. Youve earned this
because if i do a brand deal it becomes a real thing. sponsorships mean contracts, tax stuff, my name on a business
So?
so if anyone at the firm finds out i have a side business it becomes a conversation with David
You dont even know that would happen
grayson would 100% mention it to david. you know how he is
Pero mija you cant keep this small forever. The channel is growing!!
i know. im just not ready
Ok. But promise me youll think about it? Dont just delete the email
im not deleting it. i already wrote out pros and cons in notion
Thats my girl 😂 analyzing a brand deal like a legal brief
shut up lol
I love you. Whatever you decide Im behind you 100% ❤️
love u too. night Sol
Night mija. Sweet dreams 💛
look at this
started staining the bookshelf today
MIJA!! 😍 that looks amazing
what color is that??
provincial by minwax
two coats so far
its so rich looking. im obsessed
how long have you been working on this??
since november lol the cutting took forever
when can i come see it!!
its not done yet sol 😂 still need to finish and install
ok ok but when its done im bringing wine and we're celebrating 🍷
deal
bought a ticket to wizards sixers on the 27th. solo mission
Solo during christmas week??
renata will be at tomas's. figured why not
Enjoy it mija! You deserve a night out 💛
Sol i cant sleep
partnership self assessments are due end of month and i keep running the numbers in my head
Mija 😔 what numbers? The firm stuff?
billable hours. client development. plus the 529 is gone and the chase card is at 5k
Ok first breathe. Youre an incredible lawyer and David knows that
what if hes not impressed this year
He IS going to be. You just won that huge discovery motion last month. Stop spiraling
ur right. im going to try to sleep
Go swim in the morning. You always feel better after 💛
already set my alarm for 430
4:30?? Mija the pool doesnt open til 5
ill wait in the parking lot. done it before
I love you. Get some rest 🙏❤️
UVA is playing tonight! you watching?
Ooh whats the matchup
va tech. rivalry game
Oh thats a big one! What time?
7 on espn
Want to come over and watch? I can make something
cant tonight. briefs to review. watching from home
LETS GOOO
Are they winning??
up 12 second half
Wahoowa!! 🧡💙
wahoo win 78-64
Love it!! Is Renata watching too?
doubt it lol she doesnt care about sports
i snapped at fatima today
What happened??
she presented her prior art research and i was too short with her. told her the scope was wrong before she even finished
That doesnt sound like you at all
it wasnt. i apologized after but i could see she was shaken
You apologized. Thats what matters. Shes fine mija
im not sleeping and its showing up at work. this is exactly what i was afraid of
When do you see Dr Vega next?
thursday
Good. Tell her everything ok? ❤️
omg
ITS DONE
QUEEEE 😱😱😱
ADRIANA THAT IS GORGEOUS
te quedo increible mija!!
thank you 🥹
took me like 3 months but its finally in
how did you do the built in part? did you anchor it to the wall?
yeah french cleats. watched like 40 youtube videos
lol of course you did. its perfecto
ok im coming over this weekend with that wine i promised 🍷🍷
saturday works
already loading it up with books??
obvi. law review stuff and the cookbooks are already on there
the cookbooks getting prime real estate, love that for you ❤️
hey you free march 7? wizards hawks
YES im free! Book it 🏀🏀
done. 2 tix
Last game of teh season for us! Make it count 💪
Sol the cayenne needs 3400 in brake work
thirty four hundred dollars
Dios mio 😱 can you get a second opinion??
its porsche. both rotors below minimum. have to do it
And this is on top of everything else. Mija how are u paying for this
1800 on the chase card. 1600 from checking. its fine
Its not fine pero ok. You need anything?
no. grayson offered me a ride to work which was nice
See thats sweet. Let people help you sometimes 🙏
easier said than done
hey come over before the game saturday? im gonna cook
Oooh si mija!! What are you making?? 🍝
surprise
Jajaja ok ok I love surprises!! 5:30 work? 💃
perfect
GAME DAY 🏀🎉 what time we meeting?
630 at the entrance? grab food first
Perfect see u there!!
happy birthday mija. you deserve the world.
Adriana 😭 tonight was perfect. I cant believe you did all that
you deserve every bit sol
Te quiero tanto amiga ❤️🎂 best birthday
THEY WON
FINALLYYYY 🎉🎉 what a game!!
Mija!! So excited for this weekend 🏕️ What do you want me to cook for the trail?
idk something easy. sandwiches?
Sandwiches?? No no no. Im making my chicken empanadas for the hike. And trail mix with the dark chocolate
ok that sounds way better lol
Also should I bring the camp stove? For coffee in the morning
yes pls. i have the french press
Perfect! And I got a new headlamp at REI today 😎
nice. did u check the weather
Low 40s at night, high 50s during the day. Clear skies!! ☀️
perfect. its gonna be cold at night tho
I have an extra sleeping bag if u need
im good. got mine out already
What time are we leaving Saturday?
5:30? old rag trailhead gets packed early
Ay 5:30 AM?? 😩 ok fine. its worth it
ill drive. pick u up at 5
all packed. u ready?
Almost! Just finishing the empanadas. Youre gonna love them 🤤
cant wait. see u at 5
5 AM 😩 setting 3 alarms
THIS VIEW 😭😭😭 We needed this
Home safe! That was incredible mija. My legs are gonna hurt tomorrow 😂
same. totally worth it tho
The sunrise from Old Rag!! Im still thinking about it. Te quiero amiga 💛
that was exactly what i needed. thank you mija
Thats what im here for!! You looked so relaxed out there. It was beautiful to see 💛🌿
i actually slept last night. like really slept
SEE!! Nature is the best medicine. When are we going back?? 🌲
lol give my legs a week. but yes

Mija guess what!! I showed Diana your empanada video and she went and found your whole channel 😍 She LOVED it. She works at some firm on K Street and theyre doing a Latina Heritage lunch next month. She asked if youd do a little cooking demo for them. Can I give her your number??
ok sols birthday is saturday. im doing dinner at my place before the wizards game. surprise. yall in?
Yes!! Count us in 🎂
omg yes. what should we bring
nothing just show up around 530. im making pernil and tres leches
Want me to bring flowers?
that would be perfect
ill bring a card. does sol know?
no. im just telling her dinner before the game. dont mention bday
got it 🤐
She's going to love it!
she better lol. ill send a reminder friday
reminder - saturday 530 at my place. sol thinks its just dinner before the game
We'll be there! Tom is coming too
cant wait 🎉
foods almost done. come at 515 so ur here before sol gets here
Leaving now!
omw
MOM
i got accepted to study abroad in valencia!!
Oh my god! Renata thats amazing!
im so excited omggg
the deposit is 2000 due jan 10 tho
Ok well figure it out. Im so proud of you.
ty mom ❤️
hey mom my flight lands at 4:15 thursday
I know, I have it. Ill be at DCA.
k thx
hey mom heres the textbook list for spring
I saw the email. $339?
ya lol rip
Ill order them. Need them by when?
before classes start jan 13
Ok.
dads outside
Ok. Have fun. Merry Christmas.
merry christmas mom ❤️
deposit went through btw
Good. We're all set.
ready to go
Lets go. Got your ID?
ya
hey mom
spring break mar 14-22 going to miami w friends lol
Miami? With who?
my roommate casey and like 4 other girls
were staying at caseys aunts condo
Do you have the address?
ill send it later
How are you getting there
casey is driving
Ok. Text me when you get there.
k
Did you get that address for me?
oh ya
1847 collins ave miami beach
Thank you
np
told dad about ur bookshelf he said thats cool lol
Ha thanks
he asked if u built it urself i said yea
I did!
lol ik
he was like thats impressive
leaving tmrw morning
What time?
like 8
Drive safe. Stop for breaks.
mom lol
well be fine
on the road
Ok be careful. Text me tonight.
k
were here
caseys aunt has a pool lol
Good! Have fun. Be safe.
thx mom

hey mom can u venmo me 350 for the scuba certification? literally everyone is doing it. also dad keeps asking me how much school costs next year and idk what to tell him. should i just send him the bursar page?
Renata got accepted to study abroad in Valencia. Additional cost is $8,500. Can you help cover half?
Not in the agreement.
Renata lands at DCA Dec 18 at 4:15. Im picking her up.
Ok.
She can come to you the 25th. You pick her up at 10 AM?
Fine.
Im outside.
Shes coming down.
Bringing her back at 10.
Ok.
Renata flies back to UVA tomorrow. AA 1473, 10:15 AM from DCA.
Ok.
Confirm Renata is not coming to DC for break.
Confirmed. She's with friends.
Where.
Miami.
Ok.
When does she go back.
March 22.
Ok.
Did she make it.
Yes. Got there last night.
Good.
When does Renata get back to campus? Also she mentioned you have been going to a lot of appointments lately. Everything ok?
Adriana!! Georgetown is doing a 30 year reunion in April. Are you going?
oh wow maybe? when is it exactly
April 18th! Would be so fun to see everyone
Hi Adriana! That chimichurri you brought to Sol's was incredible. Would you share the recipe?
thanks! ill send it later this week
Hey Ms. Ortiz, just checking in on those shelves. Everything holding up ok?
yes looks great. thanks derek
Perfect. Let me know if you need anything else.
Adriana! Heard from Miguel you're still in DC. Coming up from Miami for Christmas. Drinks?
Roberto! its been forever. maybe, depends on Renatas schedule
No worries just lmk. Would love to catch up
Hi Adriana, I think your Amazon package got delivered to my porch by mistake. Brown box?
yes thats mine! ill swing by after work. thank you
No rush! I left it by your front door
Has anyone else noticed the construction noise starting at 6am? This is ridiculous
Yeah theyre repaving the alley behind 38th. supposed to last 2 weeks
ughhh
thanks for the heads up
FYI leaf pickup is this Thursday for our block
Hi all! Holiday party is Dec 19th at 6pm at Old Ebbitt. Please RSVP by Friday!
Count me in.
I will be there! Should we do a gift exchange again this year?
Gift exchange yes! $25 limit
we still on for 1pm saturday?
yep
in
in
heads up courts 3 and 4 only this week. some tournament
Good morning everyone! Spring family weekend is April 17-19. Registration link is on the UVA parents portal.
Thanks Helen. Already registered!
Do we know if theres a parents dinner this year?
Okayyyy dinner at my place Feb 7th! Who's in?? 🍷
Im there!
In. What should I bring
count me in
Yayyyy!! Marcos bring wine. Adri bring that tres leches please 😍
Reminder: You have an appointment with Dr. Thornton on 1/8/2026 at 10:30 AM. Reply C to confirm or R to reschedule.
C
Hi Adriana, your Cayenne is due for scheduled maintenance. Call us at (703) 555-0222 to book an appointment.
will call tomorrow
CVS: Your prescription is ready for pickup at 3401 12th St NE, Washington DC.
Your Amazon package was delivered to front door.
Verizon: Your payment of $80.00 has been received. Thank you.
Your home may qualify for a lower rate! Lock in 4.99% today. Visit refinow.co Reply STOP to opt out
Capital One: Your year-end rewards statement is ready. View your summary at capitalone.com/rewards
We've been trying to reach you about your vehicles extended warranty. This is your final notice. Call 1-800-555-0199
hey adriana! havent seen u at volleyball in a few weeks. everything ok?
just checking in no pressure
Hey! Theres a latin art exhibit at the Hirshhorn opening Friday. Thought of you, want to go?
Hey Adriana -- heard you mentioning your car's in the shop. Need a ride to the office this week?
oh thats really nice of u grayson. already got an uber but thank you
No problem. Offer stands if you need it tomorrow too.
thanks. should have it back by thursday
Claims review at 2 today. Bring updated charts.
I have the updated dependency chart ready.
good. see you both at 2
Expert depo week starts today. Everyone prepped?
ready
Yes, I have the claim charts and prosecution history binders organized.
Fatimas markman draft is really strong. Nice work pulling that together
agreed. the estoppel section was excellent
Thank you both. That means a great deal.
game on tomorrow? same time?
yep 1pm. see u there
we playing this week?
yeah ill be there
saturday?
in. might be sore from swimming tho
